name: LinkedIn Lead Generation and Automation
description: A LinkedIn automation tool that uses AI to find and generate leads automatically, targeted for professionals and businesses seeking to streamline their outreach and lead generation processes.

inputs.name: user_profile
inputs.description: User credentials or session information required to access LinkedIn for automation.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Description defining the target market or audience for lead generation.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Criteria or filters such as industry, location, job title, or company size to find relevant leads on LinkedIn.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: A list of leads generated with relevant contact and profile information matching the target criteria.

outputs.name: automation_report
outputs.description: Summary of automation activities performed, including number of leads found, messages sent, and engagement metrics.

patterns: Automated lead discovery via LinkedIn's public profile data
Using AI to interpret and match target market descriptions to LinkedIn profiles
Integration of automated messaging and follow-up workflows
steps: Define and input the target market and lead search criteria.
Authenticate and connect to LinkedIn platform.
AI processes search criteria to identify potential leads on LinkedIn.
Extract and compile leads into a structured list.
Optionally automate outreach messaging to the generated lead list.
Generate and provide automation activity reports.
use_cases: Sales and marketing teams seeking to automate LinkedIn lead generation.
Recruiters sourcing candidates from LinkedIn based on specific profiles.
Businesses aiming to accelerate outreach campaigns without manual LinkedIn searches.

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find leads on LinkedIn for the following target market: {target_market_description} with these criteria: {search_criteria}

prompt_templates.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Send the following message to each lead: {message_content}
